title: Serena Seasons X Oh The Biomes We've Gone
description: A simple datapack designed to improve compatibility between Serene Seasons and Oh The Biomes We've Gone.
body: This datapack improves compatibility between Serena Seasons and Oh The Biomes You’ll Go. Some biomes from Minecraft and BYG have been added to Serena Seasons blacklist, since they contain blocks that do not melt during warm seasons and spoiled the world’s appearance. Now seasonal changes look more natural and seamless.
